clusters.justification: Captures the underlying salience and limbic network co-activations dedicated to processing emotional valence, arousal, and subjective feeling states.
Represents the frontostriatal computations involved in assigning subjective worth to stimuli in order to hierarchically guide motivated behavior and choice.
Reflects the default mode network's overarching capacity for generating abstract, internally-directed models of agents, spanning autobiographical identity and interpersonal understanding.
